title: org query deps JSON output
description: Schema for the JSON output of 'org query deps --format json'.

source.description: Title or locator of the source entry.

source_id.description: Identifier (ID property or locator) of the source entry.

source_status.description: TODO keyword of the source entry, or null if none.

target.description: Title or locator of the target entry.

target_id.description: Identifier (ID property or locator) of the target entry.

target_status.description: TODO keyword of the target entry, or null if none.

edge_type.description: Type of dependency edge between source and target.
